rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings.
Use JetBrains Mono for system readouts, logs, terminal data, and numeric stats.
Maintain tight tracking on all headings.
Left-align text in dashboards and logs; never center-align dense data.
No purple-blue gradients. NO teal (#1B93A4) anywhere.
Use 'Tinted Grey' for surfaces, never pure #808080.
Primary CTA buttons must be solid #FFB800 with black text for high contrast.
Layer dark grays to create depth without using heavy drop shadows.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense and compact for dashboards. Use p-4 or p-6 for panels.
rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on grid children.
Avoid 'Center-Everything Disease'. Tension creates interest through asymmetry.
No glassmorphism for data-heavy areas, use flat solid surfaces.
Add 1px subtle borders to separate grid items.
Use sharp edges or max 8px (rounded-sm) border radius.

components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Dark backgrounds, sharp borders, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFB800]
components_strategy.buttons: Square edges. Primary: bg-[#FFB800] text-black font-bold. Secondary: border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white hover:bg-[#1A1A1A].
components_strategy.tables_and_logs: Dense layout, monospace font for metrics, distinct alternating row colors or border-b.
components_strategy.live_battle_map: HTML/CSS Grid or Canvas. Must be dark with glowing nodes/lines. Use tactical abstract grid image as background overlay.
components_strategy.host_commentary_box: Terminal-style fixed panel on the right or bottom. JetBrains Mono font. Typewriter effect for incoming text.
components_strategy.data_testid: ALL interactive elements MUST include a semantic data-testid (e.g., 'spawn-reinforcements-btn').

icons.instruction: Use Phosphor icons with 'duotone' or 'regular' weight for a precise tactical dashboard feel.

images.description: Cinematic dark tactical command center for the main landing or setup screen background. Use with a black/60 overlay.
images.usage: Landing page hero background or global app background with heavy opacity fade.
Display as an example when selecting planet/alien theme base building.
Display as an example when selecting historical/custom theme base building.
Use as a low-opacity background image for the live battle grid area or stat panels.

rules: DO NOT use placeholder URLs. Use ONLY the images provided above.
Ensure text over images always has a gradient overlay or solid dark container for readability.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicitly set hover states for text and backgrounds. E.g., hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-[#FFB800].
motion_and_interaction.live_updates: When stats change in the simulation, use a quick flash of #FFB800 or #FF3B30 background fading out to #121212.
motion_and_interaction.panels: Slide in from edges or simple fade-in. Keep it snappy (150-200ms).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion
Configure Tailwind for the custom color palette provided in 'colors'.
Setup JWT Auth structure (login/signup screens) using the dark tactical theme.
Build the Setup Screen: Allow users to input themes (free text), select resources, and view AI base generated previews.

Build the Live Battle Dashboard: A dense 3-column layout. Left: AI Commander 1 stats & base. Center: Live battle animated grid (use CSS grid with dynamic glowing nodes). Right: AI Commander 2 stats & base.
Implement the Host Commentary UI: A fixed terminal window displaying simulated ElevenLabs host dialogue. Include audio controls.
Implement Intervention Action Bar: A sticky bottom or center-bottom panel with aggressive, tactical buttons for 'Spawn Reinforcements', 'Trigger Weather', etc.
Create the Battle History list with rich data visualizations.
